summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SignalBeast Pro trading platform. Backend APIs 95% functional (19/20 tests pass), frontend fully functional with excellent UI/UX. Only issue is Beast AI Chat failing due to LLM budget exceeded.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 error due to LLM budget exceeded
critical_bugs.impact: Beast AI Chat feature completely non-functional
critical_bugs.error_message: Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.001575, Max budget: 0.001

integration_issues.issue: Chat messages fail due to backend LLM budget issue

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and CTA buttons
Auth page loads with Login/Register tabs and Google OAuth
GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token
Dashboard page loads with market data, charts, signals
Signals page loads with generator and signal cards
Markets page loads with Crypto/Forex/Indian tabs
Portfolio page loads with holdings table
Settings page loads with profile and security sections
Navigation sidebar works between all pages
Protected routes redirect to auth correctly
Market data displays live crypto prices
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Beast AI Chat by either increasing LLM budget limit or implementing fallback/error handling for budget exceeded scenarios. Consider using a different LLM provider or implementing rate limiting.
success_percentage: Backend: 95% (19/20 tests pass), Frontend: 100% (all core features work)
